blocks.text: 🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico Stage 1 — Leknessund & Wærenskjold open Italy campaign — 12:40

Wednesday is historic: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP at Aspmyra — the biggest club match ever played on Norwegian soil. Alisson is injured and misses Liverpool's trip to Istanbul. Arsenal (1st, 67pts) face Leverkusen in a statement European tie.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League R16 — First Legs
items: Wed 21:00 — Manchester City at Real Madrid ★★
